title: How A://Labs Works
subtitle: A deep dive into the Allternit platform architecture

modules.title: Module 1: Next.js App Router & Layouts
learningObjectives: Understand how app router works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how layouts works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how nested routes works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how loading states works in the A://Labs platform

modules.title: Module 2: Database Layer: SQLite + PostgreSQL
learningObjectives: Understand how dual database works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how sqlite works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how postgresql works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how prisma works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how migrations works in the A://Labs platform

modules.title: Module 3: Authentication & Authorization
learningObjectives: Understand how auth works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how middleware works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how sessions works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how jwt works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how permissions works in the A://Labs platform

modules.title: Module 4: API Routes & Middleware
learningObjectives: Understand how api routes works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how middleware works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how request handling works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how validation works in the A://Labs platform

modules.title: Module 5: Build & Deployment Pipeline
learningObjectives: Understand how next.js build works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how docker works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how ci/cd works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how deployment works in the A://Labs platform
Understand how vercel works in the A://Labs platform
